utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry I will not be able to make it to your imaginary wedding , but I am really busy that day . Yeah , I already have a unicorn baptism and a leprechaun bar mitzvah .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I know . I know . I panicked , I panicked . I did not want him to start yelling at me like I was some 74 Latour .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I did not want him to start yelling at me like I was some 74 Latour .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: It is Lafite . The 74 Latour is actually drinking quite nicely .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right here he comes . I am gonna do this , I am gonna tell him , I am gonna be strong .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: I just called a friend of mine .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: I think I may be able to book The Plaza on short notice .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Really ? !

emotion_cause.span: 7_I think I may be able to book The Plaza on short notice .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: What is it sweetie ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am sorry daddy .

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: I do not believe this ! !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh now daddy , stay calm . Please .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Stay calm ? ! !

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: How do you expect me to stay calm ? !

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: This is unacceptable Rachel !

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: And I wanna know why ? ! !

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is not gonna be a wedding . Ross and I are not getting married .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Is it because that punk Ross will not marry you ? !

emotion_cause.span: 18_Is it because that punk Ross will not marry you ? !

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: That is it !

emotion_cause.span: 18_Is it because that punk Ross will not marry you ? !

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Is that it ?

emotion_cause.span: 18_Is it because that punk Ross will not marry you ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes . Yes , he says I am damaged goods .
